failures.description: The agent searched all Jigsaw Puzzles instead of restricting the query to available items, then never corrected that plan. A later answer also selected the wrong available item, but the first unresolved failure was the incorrect availability constraint in the plan.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Jigsaw Puzzle. At index 1, the agent had enough information to know that availability was a required constraint, but planned a ProductCatalogSearch call with "available_only": false and explicitly stated it would include out-of-stock items. This violates the user's availability constraint and the expected search policy. The mistake was not a malformed tool call or a tool-output interpretation issue at this first point; it was a plan that failed to respect the requested constraint.
